product_name: Rain Bird Faucet Connection Kit (Backflow Preventer + Regulator + Filter)

Final Description.value: The Rain Bird Faucet Connection Kit provides everything needed to connect a drip irrigation system to a standard outdoor hose faucet. Includes an integrated backflow preventer, 25 PSI pressure regulator, and 150-mesh filter in a single compact assembly. Simply thread onto any 3/4" hose bib and connect drip tubing.

Feature Bullets 1.value: Provides everything needed to connect a drip irrigation system to a standard outdoor hose faucet.

Feature Bullets 2.value: Includes an integrated backflow preventer, 25 PSI pressure regulator, and 150-mesh filter in a single compact assembly.

Feature Bullets 3.value: Simply thread onto any 3/4" hose bib and connect drip tubing.
